Hyper-secure digital asset datastore

ECM provides the infrastructure and API for the secure storage and revision of digital assets. Backed by a permissioned based, decentralised blockchain datastore and our Encryptometrics protocol.

  • Private certificate authority and digital identities for permissioned access control to assets.
  • Encryptometrics protocol to store assets with zero-knowledge encryption and validate asset integrity through cryptography.
  • Decentralised, permissioned based blockchain storage with consensus algorythms, removing a central source of failure.
  • Immutable data and transactions making it impossible to manipulate, replace, or falsify assets.
  • Full asset audit trail and revision history. View modifications from original to current versions and the actions of each identity along the way.

More Info

Secure your digital assets
